audit_status.source_base: Greek 2 Corinthians text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for third heaven, thorn, grace sufficient, power perfected in weakness, apostolic signs, parental refusal to burden, fears over community disorder.

verses.restored: It is necessary to boast; not beneficial indeed, but I will come to visions and unveilings of the Lord.
I know a human in Messiah, fourteen years ago, whether in body I do not know, or outside the body I do not know, the Divine knows, such a one was snatched up to the third heaven.
And I know such a human, whether in body or apart from the body I do not know, the Divine knows,
that this one was snatched into paradise and heard unspeakable words, which it is not permitted for a human to speak.
On behalf of such a one I will boast, but on behalf of myself I will not boast except in weaknesses.
For if I should want to boast, I will not be foolish, for I will speak truth; but I refrain, lest anyone account to me beyond what one sees in me or hears from me.

And because of the surpassing greatness of the unveilings, so that I might not be lifted up, a thorn in the flesh was given to me, a messenger of the adversarial one, so that it might strike me, so that I might not be lifted up.
Concerning this I appealed to the Lord three times, that it might withdraw from me.
And he has said to me: My grace is sufficient for you, for power is completed in weakness. Therefore most gladly I will rather boast in my weaknesses, so that the power of Messiah may dwell upon me.
Therefore I take pleasure in weaknesses, in insults, in necessities, in pursuits/persecutions and constraints, because of Messiah; for whenever I am weak, then I am powerful.
I have become foolish; you compelled me. For I ought to have been recommended by you, for I lacked nothing of the super-apostles, even if I am nothing.
Indeed the signs of the apostle were worked out among you in all endurance, in signs and wonders and powers.
For in what were you made less than the rest of the assemblies, except that I myself did not burden you? Forgive me this injustice.

Look, this third time I am ready to come to you, and I will not burden you; for I do not seek your things but you. For the children are not obligated to store up for the parents, but the parents for the children.
And I will most gladly spend and be spent for your souls/lives. If loving you more abundantly, am I loved less?
But be that as it may, I did not burden you; yet, being crafty, I took you by deceit?
Did I take advantage of you through any of those whom I sent to you?
I appealed to Titus and sent the sibling with him. Did Titus take advantage of you? Did we not walk in the same Spirit? Not in the same footsteps?
Have you been thinking all along that we are defending ourselves to you? Before the Divine, in Messiah, we speak; and all things, beloved, are for your building up.

For I fear lest somehow, coming, I may find you not such as I wish, and I may be found by you such as you do not wish; lest somehow there be strife, jealousy, angers, selfish ambitions, slanders, whisperings, puffings up, disorders;

lest when I come again, my Divine may humble me before you, and I may mourn many of those who sinned/misaligned before and did not turn/realign from the uncleanness and sexual immorality/misuse and shameless excess that they practiced.

translation_notes: The thorn is not identified; restored layer preserves ambiguity and avoids medical/spiritual overclaiming.
Power perfected in weakness is central to the letter and must not be twisted into glorifying abuse or refusing help.
